name: empty room
description:
just a room. you can summon whatever you want, do whatever you want, etc. there’s just one catch. you can’t summon a way out. 

**note: i’m sorry if it makes things sexual/takes things down a sexual path. i set it to limitless for the horny folks on this site. please let me know if there’s anything wrong with the bot in the comments ^^
creator: astriism
